data.content:
contract,product usage	Orion
RetailCo
RetailCo expanded their existing Orion contract to include the new ML pipeline module in version 3.0.

appointment,employment	Lucas Pereira
TechNova
Lucas Pereira was appointed VP of Sales for the Iberian market at TechNova.

contract,negotiation	Carla Mendes
Sofia Costa
Carla Mendes and Sofia Costa jointly negotiated the expansion of RetailCo's Orion contract.

product component,version update	ML Pipeline Module
Orion
The ML pipeline module is a new feature included in Orion v3.0.

prior employment	Lucas Pereira
SAP Portugal
Lucas Pereira previously worked at SAP Portugal, leading enterprise sales for 8 years before joining TechNova.

employment,representation	Carla Mendes
TechNova
Carla Mendes is a TechNova representative who negotiated the Orion contract expansion on behalf of TechNova.

management,reporting structure	Lucas Pereira
Maria Santos
Lucas Pereira reports directly to CEO Maria Santos at TechNova.

collaboration,market expansion	Jorge Ferreira
Lucas Pereira
Lucas Pereira works alongside Jorge Ferreira on the Spanish market expansion.

role,sales responsibility	Iberian Market
Lucas Pereira
Lucas Pereira was appointed VP of Sales specifically responsible for the Iberian market at TechNova.

executive role,leadership	Maria Santos
TechNova
Maria Santos serves as CEO of TechNova, leading the organization.

executive role,leadership	Jorge Ferreira
TechNova
Jorge Ferreira serves as CTO of TechNova, overseeing technology strategy.

board oversight,governance	António Carvalho
TechNova
António Carvalho chairs TechNova's board, providing governance and strategic approval.

ownership,product development	Orion Platform
TechNova
TechNova developed and owns the Orion Platform as its primary product offering.

legacy system,product ownership	Apollo System
TechNova
TechNova owns and maintains the Apollo System, its legacy platform flagged for deprecation.

client relationship,contract	GlobalBank
TechNova
GlobalBank is TechNova's largest client, representing 28% of revenue under a contract until December 2025.

client relationship,contract,onboarding	RetailCo
TechNova
TechNova confirmed the expansion of RetailCo's Orion contract, indicating an ongoing client relationship.<SEP>RetailCo is a TechNova client onboarded in June 2023 on the Orion platform.

audit,regulatory compliance	CNPD
TechNova
CNPD issued a data governance audit request to TechNova in September 2023.

onboarding,platform usage	Orion Platform
RetailCo
RetailCo was onboarded exclusively on Orion v1.5, achieving a 40% reduction in data processing time.

coordination,regulatory response	CNPD Audit
Jorge Ferreira
Jorge Ferreira coordinated TechNova's response to the CNPD audit, submitted in November 2023.

legal compliance,risk flagging	Ana Rodrigues
EU AI Act
Ana Rodrigues flagged three GlobalBank contract clauses as potentially non-compliant with the EU AI Act Article 13.

migration,system integration	Apollo System
Orion Platform
The Orion Platform integrates with the legacy Apollo System, with a planned migration of all clients from Apollo to Orion by Q3 2024.

compliance,legal counsel	Linklaters
TechNova
Linklaters was engaged as external counsel to assist TechNova with EU AI Act compliance remediation.

leadership,product management	Carla Mendes
Orion Platform
Carla Mendes directed the Orion Platform launch as Product VP and led the RetailCo onboarding.

platform usage	GlobalBank
Orion Platform
GlobalBank uses the Orion Platform in addition to the Apollo System.

onboarding leadership	Carla Mendes
RetailCo
Carla Mendes co-led RetailCo's onboarding onto the Orion platform alongside Sofia Costa.

compliance risk,contract	EU AI Act
GlobalBank
Three clauses in the GlobalBank contract were flagged as potentially non-compliant with the EU AI Act, requiring remediation in Q1 2024.

collaboration,involvement,leadership,strategic initiative	Jorge Ferreira
Spanish Market Expansion
Jorge Ferreira is working on the Spanish market expansion at TechNova.<SEP>Jorge Ferreira leads TechNova's 2024 Spanish market expansion targeting 3 enterprise clients.

employment,executive role,onboarding,representation	RetailCo
Sofia Costa
Sofia Costa is the IT Director at RetailCo who represented RetailCo in the Orion contract negotiation.<SEP>Sofia Costa, as RetailCo's IT Director, co-led the onboarding process onto the Orion platform.

contract signing	GlobalBank
Maria Santos
Maria Santos co-signed the GlobalBank contract on behalf of TechNova.

prior employment	Farfetch
Jorge Ferreira
Jorge Ferreira previously worked at Farfetch before joining TechNova.

prior employment	Carla Mendes
Revolut
Carla Mendes was hired from Revolut to join TechNova in early 2023.

audit scope,data governance	CNPD Audit
Orion Platform
The CNPD audit covered data flows between the Apollo and Orion systems, particularly regarding GlobalBank data.

contractual dependency,platform usage	Apollo System
GlobalBank
GlobalBank uses the Apollo System, and contractual obligations require TechNova to maintain Apollo support until Q2 2025.

prior employment	Jorge Ferreira
Unbabel
Jorge Ferreira previously worked at Unbabel before joining TechNova.

hiring,operations	Lisbon
TechNova
TechNova has engineering teams based in Lisbon and plans to hire 20 additional engineers there.

contract signing,executive role	David Oliveira
GlobalBank
David Oliveira, as GlobalBank's CTO, co-signed the contract with TechNova.

architecture,ownership	Apollo System
Pedro Nunes
Pedro Nunes is the lead architect responsible for the Apollo System's original architecture and ongoing management.

planned release,product evolution	Orion Platform
Orion V3.0
Orion v3.0 is the next planned major release of the Orion Platform, featuring an embedded ML pipeline scheduled for May 2024.

expansion,hiring	Madrid
TechNova
TechNova plans to hire 5 engineers in Madrid as part of its Spanish market expansion.

audit scope,data governance	Apollo System
CNPD Audit
The CNPD audit covered data flows between the Apollo and Orion systems, particularly regarding GlobalBank data.

feature inclusion,product development	ML Pipeline
Orion V3.0
Orion v3.0 will include an embedded ML pipeline as a key new capability.

engineering team,operations	Porto
TechNova
TechNova has part of its Orion engineering team based in Porto.

audit scope,data governance	CNPD Audit
GlobalBank
The CNPD audit specifically covered data flows related to GlobalBank data between the Apollo and Orion systems.

deprecation decision,governance	António Carvalho
Apollo System
António Carvalho instructed the team to maintain Apollo support until at least Q2 2025 due to contractual obligations with GlobalBank.

governance,investment approval	António Carvalho
Orion Platform
António Carvalho chaired the board that approved a €15M investment in the Orion product line in January 2024.
